taylor-williams.female_specific_note: Taylor Williams Coaching focuses on female-specific HRT/peptide guidance. Per-peptide notes here often emphasize female dosing, fertility, hormone interactions.

reset_biology_synthesis.recommendation: Reset Biology suggests asking the practitioner to consider Melanotan-1 over Melanotan-2 as the safer melanocortin choice for cosmetic tanning, photoprotection, neuroimmune modulation, and (per Taylor) female anxiety/PMS support: Hunter email threadId 1961c9375d1784dd (2025-04-09): "I strongly prefer MT-1 over MT-2" and "Melanotan 1 injections at 250-500 mcg, 2-3 times weekly, should be your peptide of choice." We'd ask the prescribing physician to weigh dose to skin type and exposure goal because Hunter (0TyW-wlJMxo 00:38:30.880): "That's a pretty low dose. This is also dependent on the amount of melanin you have in your skin. Darker skin people need less. More pale people lighter skin people usually need a little bit more depending on your sun exposure," and to confirm route is subcutaneous because Hunter email threadId 19799acedca21a49 (2025-06-22): "injected subcutaneously (just under the skin, typically in the belly)."
reset_biology_synthesis.caveats:
- Nausea on dose escalation: Hunter (0TyW-wlJMxo 00:38:27.520 ctx): "if Build it up cuz it will make you nauseous," Hunter email threadId 1961c9375d1784dd (2025-04-09): "If nausea hits within 10-15 min after injection → eat a little food, should subside."
- Mole/freckle darkening risk (especially with MT-2 cross-confusion): Hunter (E7GPNidicqY 01:53:58.280): "you can get it with Melanotan I one the darkening, but I do think you get the darker moles more dominant with two versus one." Hunter email threadId 1961c9375d1784dd (2025-04-09): "Darkens freckles, moles, lips" listed under MT-2; MT-1 column reads "No exaggerated freckle/mole pigmentation."
- Photoprotection is NOT sunscreen replacement: Hunter email threadId 19b0fb03adaf2453 (2025-12-11) frames MT-1 as raising "Minimal Erythema Dose (MED) — skin handles more UV without burning," not as a sunblock substitute.
- Dose ceiling/escalation: Hunter email threadId 19799acedca21a49 (2025-06-22): "Start with 250mcg (that's 5 units) per day... Some people go up to 500mcg per day (10 units), but I suggest starting lower and seeing how you respond."
- MC4-receptor neurochemistry tradeoff: Taylor (p948IlTbY7c 00:08:00.319 ctx): "melanotin 1 actually crosses blood brain barrier which binds to your MC4 receptor" and Hunter email threadId 1961c9375d1784dd (2025-04-09) lists for MT-2 "Spontaneous prolonged erections (men)" and notes MT-1 as "No sexual side effects" — practitioner should screen for melanocortin-sensitive comorbidities.
- Spiritual/cognitive hedge — Taylor (7wdbHq4R33Y 00:07:36.560): "melanotan 1 has a really it's just a really great peptide to really reconnect yourself because of what it connects with the penal gland and how it really does like help with the brain waves with that" — anecdotal claim, not clinical.
- Variable response: Taylor (15uJlcypPSA 00:09:54.720): "that's where peptides are fun and everybody's going to respond to it different so you have to figure out and be your own guinea pig."
- Cancer/melanoma stance: Hunter email threadId 1961c9375d1784dd (2025-04-09): "NO evidence of increased melanoma risk" with the hedge "Theoretical melanoma risk + atypical mole reports" applied to MT-2, not MT-1.
- Trevor Bachmeyer has no surfaced MT-1 content in the corpus — caveats here are Hunter + Taylor only.
reset_biology_synthesis.cross_expert_consensus: Both Hunter and Taylor land on 250 micrograms subcutaneous as the standard starting dose. Hunter 2023 baseline_protocol lists "Dose" "250 mcg," "Timing" "AM," "Frequency" "2 days per week," "Duration" "8 weeks on, 8 weeks off." Hunter (0TyW-wlJMxo 00:38:27.520): "I would start with 250 micrograms. That's a pretty low dose." Taylor (V87f6GRxZLM 00:16:47.399): "continue with our um 250 micrograms of melanotan 1." Taylor (7wdbHq4R33Y 00:18:18.320): "again the dosing amount is 250 microgram." Both also describe MT-1 as MT-2's safer cousin: Hunter (0TyW-wlJMxo 00:39:25.120): "I would personally start with Melanotan I if you've never done it before." Taylor (GP0EG8UyvJo 00:05:20.440): "melanotan 1 is different from melanotan 2 melanotan 2 has some really awful negative side effects of people feeling nauseous sick." Both surface non-cosmetic benefits beyond tanning: Hunter email threadId 19b0fb03adaf2453 (2025-12-11): "Mechanistically closer to an anti-inflammatory analgesic peptide than a cosmetic drug." Taylor (p948IlTbY7c 00:08:00.319 ctx): "Melantan one is going to um increase activity of dopamine and serotonin pathways. Therefore, that is going to contribute to being in overall better mood."
reset_biology_synthesis.cross_expert_disagreement: Hunter and Taylor differ on chronic-frequency intent and on the upper end of the dose envelope. Hunter's 2023 baseline_protocol lists "Frequency" "2 days per week," but newer Hunter (0TyW-wlJMxo 00:38:27.520, 2026-03-28): "Since your first time, just do it once a week. You can go up to two to three times per week and then as you go from there, you can scale up the dose." Hunter (0TyW-wlJMxo 00:38:27.520 ctx, 2026-03-28, in same answer): "if I'm in the beach in the summer, I would do 1 mg per day. But I would build up to that." Taylor instead anchors on a higher single-purpose dose for women's anxiety/PMS — Taylor (15uJlcypPSA 00:09:54.720, 2024-12-27): "my dosing mouth that I like to do with this is 300 micrograms um subcutaneously um once a day I've had people tell me that they've used it twice a day personally for me I think using it once a day is enough for me." Taylor (V87f6GRxZLM 00:16:47.399, 2024-08-20): "continue with our um 250 micrograms of melanotan 1." The newer Hunter content (2026-03-28) supersedes the 2023 cheat-sheet "2 days per week" framing and explicitly allows scaling up to 1 mg per day for tanning goals; Taylor's 2024-12-27 300 mcg daily-for-anxiety frame is preserved alongside, not averaged. Hunter also offers a non-tanning microdose protocol that Taylor does not echo: Hunter email threadId 19b0fb03adaf2453 (2025-12-11): "250 mcg 1-2x per week — NO loading phase — NO daily injections — NO tanning protocols." Trevor Bachmeyer has no MT-1 coverage in corpus, so a third opinion is unavailable.

acute.dose: Hunter email threadId 19799acedca21a49 (2025-06-22): "Start with 250mcg (that's 5 units) per day, injected subcutaneously" with ceiling "Some people go up to 500mcg per day (10 units), but I suggest starting lower"; Hunter (0TyW-wlJMxo 00:38:30.880, 2026-03-28): "I would start with 250 micrograms. That's a pretty low dose."
acute.route: Hunter email threadId 19799acedca21a49 (2025-06-22): "injected subcutaneously (just under the skin, typically in the belly)"
acute.frequency: Hunter email threadId 19799acedca21a49 (2025-06-22): "Do this daily for 2-3 weeks, or until you reach your desired shade." Newer Hunter (0TyW-wlJMxo 00:38:27.520, 2026-03-28): "Since your first time, just do it once a week. You can go up to two to three times per week."
acute.duration: Hunter email threadId 19799acedca21a49 (2025-06-22): "daily for 2-3 weeks, or until you reach your desired shade."
acute.verbatim_citation: Hunter email threadId 19799acedca21a49 (2025-06-22): "Start with 250mcg (that's 5 units) per day, injected subcutaneously (just under the skin, typically in the belly). Some people go up to 500mcg per day (10 units), but I suggest starting lower and seeing how you respond." Hunter (0TyW-wlJMxo 00:38:27.520 ctx): "if I'm in the beach in the summer, I would do 1 mg per day. But I would build up to that cuz if Build it up cuz it will make you nauseous."

chronic.dose: Hunter 2023 baseline_protocol: "Dose" "250 mcg." Hunter email threadId 19b0fb03adaf2453 (2025-12-11): "250 mcg 1-2x per week." Hunter email threadId 1961c9375d1784dd (2025-04-09): "250-500 mcg subcutaneously" with "Equator/heavy sun + deep tan goal: 500 mcg, 3x weekly" and "Moderate protective pigmentation + minimal sun exposure: 250 mcg, 2x weekly." Taylor (V87f6GRxZLM 00:16:47.399): "continue with our um 250 micrograms of melanotan 1." Taylor (15uJlcypPSA 00:09:54.720): "my dosing mouth that I like to do with this is 300 micrograms um subcutaneously um once a day."
chronic.route: Hunter email threadId 1961c9375d1784dd (2025-04-09): "250-500 mcg subcutaneously." Taylor (15uJlcypPSA 00:09:54.720): "300 micrograms um subcutaneously."
chronic.frequency: Hunter 2023 baseline_protocol: "Frequency" "2 days per week." Hunter email threadId 1961c9375d1784dd (2025-04-09): "2-3 times per week." Hunter email threadId 19b0fb03adaf2453 (2025-12-11): "1-2x per week." Hunter email threadId 19799acedca21a49 (2025-06-22): "After that, you can maintain your tan with just 1-2 injections per week, or as needed." Taylor (15uJlcypPSA 00:09:54.720): "once a day."
chronic.duration: Hunter 2023 baseline_protocol: "Duration" "8 weeks on, 8 weeks off." Hunter email threadId 19b0fb03adaf2453 (2025-12-11): "NO loading phase — NO daily injections — NO tanning protocols" for the non-tanning microdose protocol.
chronic.verbatim_citation: Hunter email threadId 19b0fb03adaf2453 (2025-12-11): "Sweet spot for ancillary benefits — 250 mcg 1-2x per week — NO loading phase — NO daily injections — NO tanning protocols." Hunter email threadId 1961c9375d1784dd (2025-04-09): "If your goal is a beautiful, healthy tan—without nausea, intense side effects, or unnecessary risks—Melanotan 1 injections at 250-500 mcg, 2-3 times weekly, should be your peptide of choice." Taylor (V87f6GRxZLM 00:16:47.399): "continue with our um 250 micrograms of melanotan 1." Taylor (15uJlcypPSA 00:09:54.720): "my dosing mouth that I like to do with this is 300 micrograms um subcutaneously um once a day."
chronic.timestamp: Hunter emails 2025-04-09 + 2025-12-11 (no VTT timestamp); V87f6GRxZLM 00:16:47.399; 15uJlcypPSA 00:09:54.720; baseline 2023 cheat-sheet

reset_biology_synthesis.female_specific_notes: Taylor frames Melanotan-1 as a women's anxiety / PMS / spiritual-grounding peptide, not just cosmetic. Taylor (15uJlcypPSA 00:09:54.720): "melanotan 1 is the peptide that absolutely changed my world and helped me so much with dealing with anxiety hormone imbalances so that is why it is in my stack" — her dose: "my dosing mouth that I like to do with this is 300 micrograms um subcutaneously um once a day." Taylor (p948IlTbY7c 00:14:41.279): "I've had so many women reach out to me and tell me that they've used this peptide during their ludal phase of their cycle and it's helped so much. So using Melanotan 1 is one of the things that I discovered by using it during my lutier phase of my menstrual cycle" with the hedge "struggling really bad with PMS during my ludier phase of my menstrual cycle." Taylor (V87f6GRxZLM 00:16:47.399, ovulation phase): "continue with our um 250 micrograms of melanotan 1" — she keeps MT-1 cycle-long across follicular and ovulation phases. Taylor (7wdbHq4R33Y 00:18:18.320): "melanotan one great benefits for beauty purposes for tanning your skin great for spiritual connection and it is great for anxiety and PMs so those are kind of like the main things that I have noticed the biggest difference in it um so again the dosing amount is 250 microgram." Taylor (p948IlTbY7c 00:08:00.319 ctx): "melanotin 1 actually crosses blood brain barrier which binds to your MC4 receptor. This which binds to your MC4 receptor. This is what is going to help deepen your connection to emotional regulation and mental alertness." Reset Biology suggests asking the practitioner to consider whether the patient is in a luteal-phase PMS pattern, has come off hormonal birth control, or is anxiety-driven before deciding between Hunter's 250 mcg 1-2x/week non-tanning microdose and Taylor's 250-300 mcg daily PMS-relief cadence.
